

```{r}
library(lme4)
library(tidyverse)
library(car)
library(ggplot2)
library(broom)
library(emmeans)
library(ggpubr)
library(caret)
library(knitr)
library(glue)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggpmisc)
library(ggrepel)

```


```{r}


df <- read.csv("Folder2-Model_Parameter_Fits/fitting_output.csv" )
df$Estimate
#df <- df[seq(1, nrow(df), by = 2), ]
#viruses <- df$Virus

```



```{r}

genome_lengths <- c(4966,5223,7287,12027,16441)
mean_pros = df$Estimate
ci_width <- df$X95..CI.Upper.Bound - df$X95..CI.Lower.Bound
weights <- ci_width / 2

up = df$X95..CI.Upper.Bound
down = df$X95..CI.Lower.Bound

```


```{r}

df <- data.frame(genome_lengths,mean_pros,up, down)
mod_gn <- lm(mean_pros~genome_lengths, data=df)
performance::check_model(mod_gn, check="linearity")
performance::check_model(mod_gn, check="homogeneity")
performance::check_model(mod_gn, check="qq")
## no apparent violations of assumptions
tidy(mod_gn, conf.int=TRUE, conf.level=0.95)

```

```{r}
g_df <- ggplot(df, aes(x = genome_lengths, y = mean_pros)) + 
  theme_bw() +
  geom_point() + 
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = up, ymax = down), width = 400) +
  ylab(expression("Transfection Rate Constant (1/h)")) +
  xlab("Plasmid Size (base pairs)") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE) +
  stat_poly_eq(
    aes(label = paste(..eq.label.., ..rr.label.., sep = "~~~")),
    label.x.npc = "right", label.y.npc = 0.9,
    formula = y ~ x, parse = TRUE, size = 3.6
  )
ggsave("Figures/Fig3/linear_regression.svg", plot = g_df, width = 6, height = 4, device = "svg")
g_df

```
